overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom showing the protagonist exploring the snowy Spring of Wisdom area at night. The character traverses shallow water, ancient stone bridges, and narrow mountain paths while accompanied intermittently by a glowing sage companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient spring pool with ice mountain backdrop

events.description: location text 'Spring of Wisdom' appears on screen identifying the area
character turns left and begins walking away from the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: standing before the massive ice-covered mountain, then turning to survey the surrounding ruins

entered.detail: massive jagged ice formation with blue-white textures dominating the background
ancient carved stone platform at the water's edge with weathered details
shallow reflective water covering the ground with ripples

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the Spring of Wisdom with the character standing before a massive ice-covered mountain peak. The ground is covered in shallow water, and ancient stone ruins are visible nearby. The character turns left and begins walking through the water as the location text appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pool area with scattered ancient pillars

events.description: character pauses briefly to look around before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow water while observing the ancient stone pillars and surroundings

notable_agents.action: glowing blue sage companion floating and following behind the player character

entered.detail: tall ancient stone columns rising from the water with carved tops

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shallow water of the open pool area, passing tall ancient stone pillars. A glowing blue sage companion follows behind, floating above the water. The character pauses momentarily to look around the misty ruins before continuing forward.

events.description: ground surface changes from water to snow-covered stone bridge
passing near a burning campfire on the right side providing warm orange light

agents.ego_description: walking up the snow-covered bridge toward the higher mountain elevations

entered.detail: ancient stone walkway covered in snow leading upward with carved railings
burning fire with smoke rising, providing warm orange light against the blue snow

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water onto a snow-covered stone bridge leading upward. A burning campfire on the right side casts warm orange light against the cold blue snow. The bridge ascends toward higher elevations, with the character walking steadily up the incline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail between rocky cliffs

events.description: passing glowing ice-covered trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing up the narrow snowy mountain path flanked by rock walls and ice formations

entered.detail: trees encased in glowing blue ice crystals emitting faint light
dark stone formations lining the narrow path creating a corridor

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between rocky cliffs as the character ascends higher into the mountains. Glowing blue ice-covered trees appear on the left side, emitting a faint ethereal light. The snow-covered trail winds upward through the enclosed mountain passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, watery basin of the Spring of Wisdom up into a narrow, frozen mountain pass. It begins with the character standing before a massive ice-covered peak, turning to wade through shallow water amidst ancient stone ruins. As the character moves past tall stone pillars accompanied by a floating blue sage, the scene shifts from the misty pool onto a snow-covered stone bridge. The camera then ascends the incline, passing a burning campfire that casts a warm orange glow against the cold blue snow, before the path narrows between rocky cliffs. Finally, the trail winds higher into the mountains, flanked by ethereal, glowing blue ice-covered trees that light the enclosed passage.
